name: code-review
description: Strict evidence-based code review and safe fix workflow for frontend, backend, fullstack, security, database, dependencies, testing, CI/CD, deployment, and verified patching.

interface.shortDescription: Strict evidence-based code audit and safe fix workflow.
interface.longDescription: Review code with hard evidence rules, docs grounding, severity gates, fix approval gates, verification gates, and consistent reports. This plugin intentionally has no MCP dependency.
defaultPrompt: Use Code Review to audit this codebase with evidence-based findings, follow fix approval gates, and verify every patch before closing.
Use Code Review to run a security-focused audit checking for injection, XSS, CSRF, SSRF, secrets exposure, and unsafe configuration.
Use Code Review to perform a frontend, backend, database, or dependency supply chain review of this project.
